scope.target: Inventory AI context files and classify audience, scope, language, and migration action.
scope.dependency_radius: Repository documentation and AI context assets only.
constraints: Do not move files during inventory.
Classify by folder first, then by file content when needed.

inputs.architecture_target: Separated universal AI context and .NET backend-only AI context.
user_constraints: Human-facing context should use Traditional Chinese Taiwan wording.

steps: Scan AI context and documentation roots.
Create a classification artifact with audience, scope, language, and action columns.
Mark likely universal and dotnet-backend-specific hotspots.
validation: Confirm classification artifact covers .ai, .agents, .claude, .dev, README, and agents.md.
deferred_items: File moves are handled by later tasks.
